caption: A man with grey hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and purple tie, speaks while facing the camera. He is positioned in an office-like setting with light-colored walls and a glass door or partition behind him. A small microphone is attached to his cheek. Across the bottom of the screen, a graphic overlay persists, featuring a blue cube logo on the left and the "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo on the right. Text overlays change between frames: in some, the text reads "MONGODB WORLD 2022 #MDW22 | #theCUBE" and "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY"; in others, it identifies the speaker as "DAVE VELLANTE Co-Founder & Co-CEO, SiliconANGLE Media, Inc. | @dvellante" along with the "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY" location. As the clip progresses, the man continues speaking, with slight variations in his facial expression and head tilt.
